objective: dogfood Campfire on itself and harden lifecycle verification coverage

current.slice_title: Bound the evaluator scope, then implement and validate it
acceptance_criteria: Campfire includes a generic task-evaluator skill with agent metadata and references
The installer and repo verifier include the evaluator skill
Campfire has evaluator-focused verification coverage or a documented evaluator verification path
README and task-state docs describe where task evaluation fits in the loop
